name: 衝突預告鉤子
description: 標題直接預告了核心衝突——離婚。觀眾從一開始就知道女主要離婚，但好奇的是過程中會遇到什麼阻礙、如何讓霸總從拒絕到哀求，這種「已知結局但未知過程」的鉤子非常有效。

examples.drama_title: Transmigrated Besties Team Up to Divorce Billionaires—Now They Beg for Forgiveness!  🔥
examples.excerpt: 'Divorce Billionaires—Now They Beg for Forgiveness!' 標題本身就是一個衝突預告鉤子，告訴觀眾結局但讓人好奇過程。

examples.drama_title: 【FULL】Transmigrated with a System, I Turned a Starving Sect into a Luxury Brand#minidrama
examples.excerpt: From heart-pounding action to gripping revenge plots and unexpected twists, we bring you the most exciting stories that keep you on the edge of your seat!!!

examples.drama_title: On her first day, the cleaning girl defied the CEO, expecting to be fired—but he proposed to her!
examples.excerpt: Yanju and Shei, if I expose your little affair right now, that would be letting you off too easy. I'm going to make you a laughingstock on your wedding day in front of the whole city.

examples.drama_title: 她被拉去當女傭，總裁卻聽見她心聲，從此黏上她了！🔔#短劇 #逆襲 #爽劇 #豪門 #打臉  Chinese short drama
examples.context: 開場（通過標題和前幾分鐘的壓迫場景暗示）
